sf-section--collapse.description: Page section with vertical padding. Size modifiers

sf-prose.description: Long-form text column with automatic vertical rhythm.

sf-not-prose.description: Long-form text column with automatic vertical rhythm.

sf-flow.description: Heydon Pickering's "lobotomized owl" — every flow child gets

sf-equal-height.description: Force grid/flex children to share the tallest one's height.

sf-aspect.description: Generic aspect-ratio container. Distinct from layout's

sf-scroll-shadow.description: Top + bottom mask gradient that reveals when content is

sf-scroll-snap.description: Vertical scroll-snap container for vertically stacked sections.

sf-overflow-fade.description: End-edge horizontal fade for clipped inline content

sf-no-tap-highlight.description: Suppresses the WebKit/Android grey tap-highlight overlay on

sf-surface--primary.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--secondary.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--tertiary.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--action.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--neutral.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--inverse.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--success.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--warning.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--error.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--info.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-surface--danger.description: Sets background + auto-flipped foreground in one class.

sf-text-gradient.description: Fills text with a gradient. Defaults to --sf-gradient-primary

sf-link-external.description: Adds an external-link glyph after the link text. Opt-in per

is-hidden.description: Hides the element (display: none). Toggled by JS or ARIA.

is-invisible.description: Makes the element invisible but still occupies space.

is-visible.description: Forces visibility: visible on a hidden element.

is-disabled.description: Marks the element as non-interactive. Reduces opacity and blocks pointer events.

is-readonly.description: Marks the element as read-only. Reduces opacity; pointer events still active.

is-loading.description: Indicates the element is in a loading state. Shows a spinner cursor.

is-current.description: Marks the element as the current item (e.g. active nav link).

is-expanded.description: Marks the element as expanded (e.g. accordion open).

is-open.description: Marks the element as open (e.g. dropdown visible).

is-valid.description: Marks a form field as passing validation.

is-invalid.description: Marks a form field as failing validation.

is-required.description: Marks a form field as required.

is-error.description: Marks the element as being in an error state.

is-success.description: Marks the element as being in a success state.

is-warning.description: Marks the element as being in a warning state.

is-info.description: Marks the element as carrying informational state.

is-scrolled.description: Applied by JS when the page has scrolled past a threshold.

is-truncated.description: Truncates text with an ellipsis (single line).

is-sr-only.description: Visually hidden but accessible to screen readers.
